nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Usage guide for GitHub issue templates in the Epic: Fix CFBD Client Test Failures. Describes two story templates (STORY-CFBD-01 investigation, STORY-CFBD-02 implementation), three creation methods (GitHub web UI, gh CLI, manual paste), template structure (overview/user story/context/acceptance criteria/implementation guide/definition of done/risks/links/notes), interactive checkbox workflow, recommended issue sequencing (01 before 02), and labels reference (investigation, bug, tests, priority-high, epic-cfbd-test-failures).

nodes.name: story-cfbd-01-investigate-api-schema.md
nodes.summary: GitHub issue template for STORY-CFBD-01: investigation of CFBD API field naming convention (camelCase homePoints/awayPoints vs snake_case home_points/away_points) causing 6 failing tests in test_cfbd_client.py where get_current_week() returns None. Estimated 2-4 hours effort, high priority. Integration points: CFBDClient in src/integrations/cfbd_client.py and tests/unit/test_cfbd_client.py.

nodes.name: story-cfbd-02-fix-test-mocks.md
nodes.summary: GitHub issue template for STORY-CFBD-02 (blocked by STORY-CFBD-01): fix 6 failing tests in test_cfbd_client.py where test mocks use incorrect field names. Failing tests include test_get_current_week_with_completed_games, test_get_current_week_week_1_only, test_get_current_week_ignores_missing_week_field, and 3 others. Goal: align test mocks with real CFBD API schema to restore CI/CD to green. Estimated 2-4 hours effort.
